## Summary

Describe the architecture, IaC, documentation, or workflow change.

## Change Type

- [ ] Governance or policy
- [ ] Identity or RBAC
- [ ] Network
- [ ] Security or Defender
- [ ] AKS or workload platform
- [ ] CI/CD or automation
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] Terraform fmt/validate reviewed
- [ ] Bicep build reviewed
- [ ] Checkov/security impact reviewed
- [ ] Cost/tagging impact reviewed
- [ ] Manual apply required for production changes

## Risk Notes

Call out any tenant-specific assumptions, management group changes, subscription impacts, or production approval requirements.
